# Load the quranic_verses.json file and inspect entries around matches.
import json, re, sys, os
path = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
len(data)

import unicodedata,regex as re
def normalize_ar(text):
    # Remove diacritics (tashkeel)
    # But need to remove tatweel, punctuation, unify hamza forms, lowercase, collapse spaces
    # We'll use simple mapping.
    import re
    # map hamzas to bare alef? We'll unify to bare ا?
    # But careful: unify hamza-on-alef variants to same char: إ أ آ => ا, ؤ ئ => و/ي? We'll map them to ا and ؤ/ئ to و/ي maybe not needed.
    s = text
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640','')
    # normalize hamza forms to ا where appropriate
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # Replace hamza on waw/ya - leave as is maybe unify to ؤ ئ? We'll keep them.
    # Remove diacritics (Tashkeel)
    tashkeel = ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0610,0x061A)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x064B,0x0653)]) + ''.join([chr(x) for x in range(0x0654,0x0656)])
    for ch in tashkeel:
        s = s.replace(ch, '')
    # also remove small alef khanjars etc
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670]', '', s)
    # remove punctuation and diacritic-like marks
    s = re.sub(r'[\u060C\u061B\u061F\.\,\:\;\?\!\-\(\)\"\'\“\”\«\»]', '', s)
    # collapse whitespace and lower (Arabic doesn't have case but just strip)
    s = ' '.join(s.split())
    return s

# search for words containing ادفع
matches = []
for entry in data:
    text = entry.get('ayah_text') or entry.get('text') or entry.get('verse_text') or entry.get('text_indopak') if 'text_indopak' in entry else None
    if text and 'ادفع' in text or 'ادْفَع' in text:
        matches.append((entry.get('index') if 'index' in entry else None, entry.get('surah') if 'surah' in entry else None, text))
len(matches), matches[:10]

# Candidate from DB
candidate = "وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ"
full_span = "ادفع السيئة بالحسنة. ذلك خير وأفضل بالفعل "
# define normalization
import re, unicodedata
def normalize_ar(text):
    s = text
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('\u0640','')
    # unify hamza
    s = s.replace('إ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # remove tashkeel
    tashkeel_pattern = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0654-\u065F\u0670]')
    s = tashkeel_pattern.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A]', ' ', s)  # allow arabic letters, digits, underscores, spaces - replace others with space
    # collapse spaces
    s = ' '.join(s.split())
    return s.strip()

cand_norm = normalize_ar(candidate)
span_norm = normalize_ar(full_span)
cand_norm, span_norm

response_context = 'قال الله تعالى في كتابه العزيز "ادفع السيئة بالحسنة. ذلك خير وأفضل بالفعل ". سورة فصلت الآية 34. حديث شريف للنبي محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم يقول "أفضل الإيمان الحب في الله والبغض في الله".'
slice_ = response_context[33:75]
slice_, len(slice_)

content.text: {"correction":"وَلَا تَسْتَوِي الْحَسَنَةُ وَلَا السَّيِّئَةُ ۚ ادْفَعْ بِالَّتِي هِيَ أَحْسَنُ فَإِذَا الَّذِي بَيْنَكَ وَبَيْنَهُ عَدَاوَةٌ كَأَنَّهُ وَلِيٌّ حَمِيمٌ"}
